privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TestingWithEkki ("we", "us", or "our") respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

noSelling.title: We Don't Sell Your Data
noSelling.content: We do not sell or share your personal information with advertisers or data brokers. Period.

whatWeCollect.title: What We Collect
items: **Account Information**: Email address, username, and profile picture (if you sign up with Google/GitHub).
**Learning Progress**: Your completed challenges, tutorials, XP, and achievements.
**Technical Data**: Basic usage data like page views via Google Analytics to improve the platform.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Data
items: To provide your learning experience (save progress, show leaderboard).
To send important emails (verification, password reset).
To improve the platform based on aggregate usage patterns.

yourControl.title: Your Control
items: You can update or delete your profile at any time.
You can request a full data export or deletion by contacting us.
Your email is never displayed publicly.

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParties.content: We use trusted third-party services: Google OAuth (login), Google Analytics (anonymous usage), and Supabase (database). These services have their own privacy policies.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We use industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption, secure password hashing, and regular security updates.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: This platform is intended for users 13 years or older. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.content: We may update this policy occasionally. Significant changes will be announced on the platform.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: Questions about privacy? Email us at ekki@testingwithekki.com

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have questions, feedback, or want to collaborate? Reach out!

form.name: Name
form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out! I'll get back to you soon.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

booking.title: Book a 1-1 Session
booking.description: Prefer a live conversation? Schedule a video call to discuss testing strategies, career advice, or code reviews.

hire.title: Open for Opportunities
hire.description: Looking for a Senior QA Engineer or Test Architect? I help teams build reliable, high-quality software.
